name: ruff-action
description: A GitHub Action to run Ruff, an extremely fast Python linter and code formatter.

scripts.act: act pull_request -W .github/workflows/test.yml --container-architecture linux/amd64 -s GITHUB_TOKEN="$(gh auth token)"
scripts.update-known-checksums: RUNNER_TEMP=known_checksums node dist/update-known-checksums/index.cjs src/download/checksum/known-checksums.ts "$(gh auth token)"
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:unit
scripts.all: npm run build && npm run check && npm run package && npm run test:unit

author: @eifinger
